arts.ttl: Chelsea signed me after I beat them but Jose Mourinho didn't play me - I don't have any regrets - football.london
arts.sum: Parker, who totted-up just 28 appearances in all competitions for the Blues after a high-profile transfer across the capital from Charlton in January 2004 - prompted by an eye-catching performance against Chelsea prior to that - played back-up to Claude Makelele in his only full season at Stamford Bridge and an unwanted injury cut short his own campaign before he did manage to get his hands on a Premier League winner's medal. "When you look at my three years prior to Chelsea, I was playing some really good football and doing really well," said Parker during an in-depth interview with The Independent - in 2005 - shortly after his 18 months at Stamford Bridge was brought to an end with a switch to Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Chelsea handed clear title race advantage amid Liverpool nightmare - with one catch - Liam Wood - football.london
arts.sum: "The way we are playing, in terms of points, but the main focus for us is always how we can improve the players and improve game by game," the Italian head coach went on. As he addressed the media before their Boxing Day showdown, Maresca downplayed Chelsea's title credentials - and not for the first time either - but the actual reality is the Blues have to be considered as contenders.
